title: Creamy Algerian Hazelnut Tagine
description: A rich and creamy Algerian dish featuring hazelnuts, perfect for a date night, made with low calorie ingredients and cooked in a raclette grill to achieve a jammy and silky texture.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to medium heat.
In a bowl, mix together the chopped hazelnuts, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
In the raclette grill, heat the olive oil and saute the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the grill and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mixed hazelnut spice blend to the grill and cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and heavy cream, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped hazelnuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the creamy tagine hot, garnished with additional chopped hazelnuts if desired.
